description: A passionate AI & Backend Developer with hands-on experience in building Agentic AI systems, Geo-AI platforms, and scalable Machine Learning solutions. Skilled in Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, LangChain, RAG pipelines, Computer Vision, and Generative AI, I focus on solving real-world problems through intelligent engineering and AI-driven optimization. I have experience developing scalable AI-powered applications, backend architectures, automation workflows, and context-aware AI systems that improve efficiency, performance, and user experience. Driven by continuous learning and innovation, I aim to create impactful technology solutions across diverse domains.
